name: green-lab-support
description: Green Lab customer support AI agent — multi-channel, HIPAA-grade.

scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build: echo 'aggregate build via uv/npm in each workspace'
scripts.lint: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check . && cd ../.. && cd apps/web && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd apps/api && uv run pytest -q && cd ../.. && cd apps/web && npm test --silent
scripts.eval: cd packages/evals && uv run python run_ragas.py
